tools_used.args:
{"sql": "
SELECT 
  b.stock_code,
  b.stock_abbr,
  b.equity_unappropriated_profit,
  i.net_profit,
  ROUND(b.equity_unappropriated_profit / i.net_profit, 2) as profit_ratio,
  b.asset_liability_ratio,
  b.asset_total_assets,
  b.liability_total_liabilities
FROM balance_sheet b
JOIN income_sheet i ON b.stock_code = i.stock_code AND b.report_period = i.report_period
WHERE b.report_period = '2025Q3' 
  AND i.net_profit > 0
  AND b.equity_unappropriated_profit > 0
ORDER BY profit_ratio DESC
"}

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "
SELECT 
  b.stock_code,
  b.stock_abbr,
  b.equity_unappropriated_profit,
  i.net_profit,
  ROUND(b.equity_unappropriated_profit / i.net_profit, 2) as profit_ratio,
  b.asset_liability_ratio,
  ROUND(b.asset_total_assets / 10000, 2) as total_assets_wan,
  ROUND(b.liability_total_liabilities / 10000, 2) as total_liabilities_wan
FROM balance_sheet b
JOIN income_sheet i ON b.stock_code = i.stock_code AND b.report_period = i.report_period
WHERE b.report_period = '2025Q3' 
  AND i.net_profit > 0
  AND b.equity_unappropriated_profit > 0
  AND (b.equity_unappropriated_profit / i.net_profit) > 5
ORDER BY profit_ratio DESC
"}
